rationale: The citing paper references Inman, Park, and Sinha (2008) as one example in a literature review of attribute-based SKU choice models, noting that it identifies attributes linked to switching versus repeat purchase. The citation is used to position prior work broadly rather than to supply a core mechanism, method, or measure adopted in the new model. The proposed ABMM framework is developed from mixed-membership and topic-model ideas and does not directly build on or test the 2008 dynamic choice-map model.
